programme.desc: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

programme.desc: Taylor Fritz and Ben Shelton - the Dallas top two - vie for the crown. Fritz downed Marin Cilic in the semi-finals, while Shelton dethroned reigning champion Denis Shapovalov. (15.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Buenos Aires
programme.desc: One win away from his first title on home soil, Argentine Francisco Cerundolo competes for the Buenos Aires title against second seed Luciano Darderi of Italy. (15.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Ostrava
programme.desc: Katie Boulter targets her fourth career title as the former world number 23 faces Germany's Tamara Korpatsch in the Ostrava final. Boulter will return to the top 100 with victory. (07.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned in the final of the 2026 Qatar Open. (14.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Miami
programme.desc: In Miami, the women's final get underway as top seed Aryna Sabalenka meets with home favourite Jessica Pegula in a repeat of last year's US Open decider. (29.03)

programme.title: ATP Final: Madrid
programme.desc: Britain's Jack Draper steps on court for the Madrid Open final aiming to lift his second Masters 1000 crown, as the 23-year-old faces 14th seed Casper Ruud for the first time. (04.05)

programme.title: WTA Final: Madrid
programme.desc: In a repeat of the 2023 US Open final, two-time Madrid champion Aryna Sabalenka eyes another marquee title against Coco Gauff, who won their only prior clay-court meeting. (03.05)

programme.title: WTA Final: Doha
programme.desc: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

programme.title: Australian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: A McLaren one-two forms the front row for the Australian Grand Prix, as Lando Norris leads from Oscar Piastri. Max Verstappen starts third, while Lewis Hamilton begins from P8. (16.03)

programme.title: Chinese F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's a first Grand Prix pole for Oscar Piastri as George Russell splits the McLarens with Lando Norris starting third. Sprint winner Lewis Hamilton comes from fifth on the grid. (23.03)

programme.title: Japanese F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Suzuka for the Japanese Grand Prix. World champion Max Verstappen starts from the front of the grid with the McLaren duo of Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri behind. (06.04)

programme.title: Bahrain F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the 2025 Bahrain Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri holds pole position with his McLaren teammate Lando Norris down in P6. Charles Leclerc joins Piastri on the front row. (13.04)

programme.title: Saudi Arabian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Jeddah for the 2025 Saudi Arabian Grand Prix. Reigning world champion Max Verstappen crossed the finish line in P1 last season at the Jeddah Corniche Circuit. (20.04)

programme.title: Miami F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: Polesitter Max Verstappen is joined by Lando Norris and Kimi Antonelli heading into turn one, while Lewis Hamilton tries to fight through the field from P12. (04.05)

programme.title: Emilia Romagna F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Imola for the 2025 Emilia Romagna Grand Prix. Last season, reigning world champion Max Verstappen held off a late Lando Norris charge to claim race victory. (18.05)

programme.title: Monaco F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: On the streets of Monte Carlo, the 2025 Monaco Grand Prix arrives. Lando Norris lines up in P1 with Charles Leclerc behind him as the Monegasque pursues back-to-back home wins. (25.05)

programme.title: Spanish F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's an all-papaya front row as McLaren lead the way with Oscar Piastri from Lando Norris. Max Verstappen and George Russell form the second row, while Lewis Hamilton starts P5. (01.06)

programme.title: Canadian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the Canadian Grand Prix as George Russell and Max Verstappen line-up alongside each other at the front with Oscar Piastri in third. Lando Norris comes from P7. (15.06)

programme.title: Austrian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: Lando Norris bounces back to take pole alongside Charles Leclerc. Oscar Piastri and Lewis Hamilton share row two, while Max Verstappen starts down in P7 for Red Bull's home race. (29.06)

programme.title: British F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Silverstone. Max Verstappen shares the front row with Oscar Piastri, while Brits Lando Norris, George Russell and Lewis Hamilton round out the top five. (06.07)

programme.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

programme.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

programme.title: Dutch F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Zandvoort. Pipping his team mate to pole, Oscar Piastri leads Lando Norris as Max Verstappen looks to spring a surprise from P3 with Isack Hadjar for company. (31.08)

programme.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

programme.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

programme.title: Azerbaijan F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: In Baku, Max Verstappen leads a mixed-up starting grid with Carlos Sainz and Liam Lawson in podium contention. Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri bid to come through the field. (21.09)

programme.title: Singapore F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Marina Bay Circuit for the 2025 Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell claims Mercedes' second pole of the season, with Max Verstappen starting in second. (05.10)

programme.title: US F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the United States Grand Prix. A growing threat in the title fight, Max Verstappen has pole from Lando Norris as championship leader Oscar Piastri starts in P6. (19.10)

programme.title: Mexico City F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Mexico City. Lando Norris aims to capitalise on a big opening in the title race as the Ferraris of Charles Leclerc and Lewis Hamilton round out the top three. (26.10)

programme.title: Sao Paulo F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out at Interlagos. An opportunity presents itself to poleman Lando Norris in the title chase with Oscar Piastri starting P4 and Max Verstappen way down the grid. (09.11)

programme.title: Las Vegas F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: As the lights go out on the Strip for the Las Vegas Grand Prix, championship leader Lando Norris starts from P1 with Max Verstappen behind. Oscar Piastri lines up in fifth place. (23.11)

programme.title: Qatar F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out in Qatar. As Lando Norris lines up in P2 a win away from the world championship, it's down to polesitter Oscar Piastri and Max Verstappen to deny the Brit the title. (30.11)

programme.title: Abu Dhabi F1 GP Highlights
programme.desc: It's lights out for the title decider. Starting behind polesitter Max Verstappen, Lando Norris will become world champion with a podium. Oscar Piastri has it all to do from third. (07.12)

programme.desc: Nicola's been divorced twice but is still young at heart and hopes for a new love. Mark, who has Crohn's disease, has lost his body confidence but is now ready to conquer his fear.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The Totally Disastrous One: Dean plans a series of controlled disasters for the 'Wedding that Goes Wrong'. Will bride Kayleigh see the funny side of setting someone on fire at the ceremony?

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Froggy shares memories with Rex as they scatter Grace's ashes. Ro makes a decision about his future. The McQueens panic when the police turn up. A couple are forced to face their feelings.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The McQueens panic when the police turn up on their doorstep. The wheels are in motion for Donny's new business. And a confession breaks a resident's heart.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Vicky struggles to decide what she wants for her future. A mother puts her foot down. And a couple are forced to face their feelings, but is it the end?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Return to Amy's Baking Company: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Pantaleone's: In Colorado, Gordon visits Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, whose stubborn owner Pete claims that he makes 'the best pizza in Denver'. Sadly, Gordon doesn't agree.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Fonzie Scheme: Murray is honoured for his business skills. Barry's scheme to steal golf carts goes off the rails. Beverly attempts to help Murray find a hobby.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Day After the Day After: After watching a scary TV film, Barry begs Murray to build an underground bunker.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Written in the Stars: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset with Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Wine Weekend: The family go on a wine-tasting trip, and Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house - but they can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Old Neighborhood: Gordon visits Arvada in Colorado, where out-of-control hoarder Randy and his wife Alexa have allowed their restaurant Old Neighborhood to fall into disrepair.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Kati Allo: Gordon's in New York, where the stress of running a Greek restaurant has driven Manny and Christine to the brink of divorce, with their daughter stuck in the middle.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Into the Woods: Peralta and Boyle persuade Jeffords to join them on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods, but it isn't the fun excursion they'd hoped for.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Mattress: Peralta and Santiago convince Captain Holt to let them work together on a case involving a new street drug, but their romance gets in the way.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A Milhouse Divided: When Milhouse's parents split up, his mum gets together with an American Gladiator called Pyro, his dad self-produces an album and Milhouse goes a bit crazy.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa's Date with Density: Lisa has a crush on Nelson. But can she get him to change his ways?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Circle of Driving Again: When Murray insists that Adam must have driving lessons, the family learn something new about Pops. Barry visits Erica at college.

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A Sketchy Area: Phil finds a new career after visiting Luke's college. Mitch's new case as an assistant DA is marred by an unflattering courtroom sketch by the resident artist.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Torn Between Two Lovers: Haley struggles when she must choose between her past and present relationships. Manny returns to college while his girlfriend stays at Jay and Gloria's.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: House Mouses: Peralta insults Hitchcock and Scully's work ethic, so they try to get involved in a dangerous investigation in an attempt to prove themselves.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Adrian Pimento: The precinct gets a new detective who's been on a 12-year undercover assignment with the Mob. Gina directs a video for Captain Holt.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brother from Another Series: Sideshow Bob (guest star Kelsey Grammer) is once again released from prison, into the care of his respectable brother Cecil (David Hyde Pierce).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: My Sister, My Sitter: Lisa starts a new career as a babysitter. All is going well, until Marge and Homer employ her to look after Bart and Maggie...

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A discovery sparks a police search at the school. Dodger sets out to prove that Smithy is corrupt. Vicky's confidence is crushed. And tensions erupt over two clashing engagement parties.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: El Viaje Misterioso de Nuestro Jomer (The Mysterious Voyage of Our Homer): Homer eats a dangerous chilli, has a hallucinogenic trip and meets a talking coyote (Johnny Cash).

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Good Grief: It's another epic Halloween full of costumes, tricks and treats for the Dunphy-Pritchett-Tucker clan as they deal with huge, unexpected news.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: On the Same Paige: Phil's real estate class will be cancelled if any more students drop it. So he turns on his charm to try to convince one student, Paige, to stay.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Cheddar: Santiago and Peralta house-sit for Captain Holt when he visits Kevin in Paris and mayhem ensues when Holt's beloved dog goes missing on their watch.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Terry Kitties: Jeffords enlists Peralta's help to solve a case from his past. Santiago invites herself to a competitive training exercise with Holt and Diaz.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.desc: Grade School Confidential: Principal Skinner and Mrs Krabappel embark on a torrid affair but have to bribe Bart to keep the whole thing a secret.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Vicky takes drastic measures as her insecurities deepen. At breaking point, Nancy makes a difficult decision. And there's a race against time when a threat puts lives in danger...

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: (2022) Adults only horror with Daisy Edgar-Jones. When date-weary Noa meets a guy in a supermarket, she thinks things are looking up. But he's oddly obsessed with not eating animals...

programme.title: A Banquet
programme.desc: (2021) Tense body-horror with Sienna Guillory. A teenage girl suddenly stops eating, but stays the same weight... Could she be a monster from Japanese folklore who has a hidden extra mouth?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
programme.desc: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

programme.title: Think Like a Dog
programme.desc: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

programme.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
programme.desc: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

programme.title: The Last Stand
programme.desc: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

programme.title: Bad Boys for Life
programme.desc: (2020) Action-comedy starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence. Just when Marcus is planning to retire, a vengeful drug lord's son shoots Mike. Can our dynamic duo beat the cartel?

programme.title: Lucky Break
programme.desc: (2001) Comedy. James Nesbitt and Lennie James play inmates who see their prison governor's dreadful musical as a chance to stage a breakout. With Christopher Plummer and Olivia Williams.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal
programme.desc: Lucindha Lawson shares the story of how she made history by becoming the first deaf Asian woman to win a gold for England in the European Women's Deaf Futsal Championship.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Broken Lance
programme.desc: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Black Swan
programme.desc: (1942) Swashbuckling adventure with Laird Cregar and Tyrone Power. Privateer Captain Henry Morgan tries to rid the Caribbean of pirates when he's made Governor of Jamaica. Bit rich.

programme.title: Criss Cross
programme.desc: (1949) Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: (1959) Western starring Henry Fonda. A gunfighter is hired to protect a town from a raiding gang. But a vendetta could undermine him. With Anthony Quinn, Richard Widmark and Dorothy Malone.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary...
programme.desc: ...Gentlemen: (2003) Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war?

programme.title: M3GAN
programme.desc: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

programme.title: Late Night with the Devil
programme.desc: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

programme.title: Radical
programme.desc: (2023) Uplifting, fact-based drama with Eugenio Derbez. An inspirational teacher literally and figuratively turns his class upside down in a Mexican border town. In Spanish/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Man from Colorado
programme.desc: (1948) Western. When a sadistic Union colonel (Glenn Ford) becomes a federal judge after the Civil War, his friend (William Holden) takes the deputy job to try and temper his actions.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret...
programme.desc: ...Weapon: (1942) WWII spy adventure starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson attempt to prevent the Nazis from acquiring a revolutionary invention.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: (1954) Cold War thriller. Richard Widmark stars as the leader of a submarine expedition, sent to the frozen depths of Alaska to thwart the Chinese communists' plans to start WWIII.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black. Four teenagers are sucked into the Jumanji video game to complete a dangerous quest.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody Interview...
programme.desc: ...Special: Rami Malek discusses playing Freddie Mercury in the rock biopic about the rise of the band Queen.

programme.title: Renfield
programme.desc: (2023) Comedy horror vampire shenanigans with Nicholas Hoult, Awkwafina and a full-blooded Nicolas Cage. Dracula's familiar gets distracted from procuring food for his master.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: (2022) Adults only horror with Daisy Edgar-Jones. When date-weary Noa meets a guy in a supermarket, she thinks things are looking up. But he's oddly obsessed with not eating animals...

programme.title: A Banquet
programme.desc: (2021) Tense body-horror with Sienna Guillory. A teenage girl suddenly stops eating, but stays the same weight... Could she be a monster from Japanese folklore who has a hidden extra mouth?

programme.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight
programme.desc: Join Alex for two hours of lively debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the big issues of the day with Alex's fresh take on every story.

programme.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight Late Edition
programme.desc: Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Alex Armstrong.

programme.title: The Late Show Live
programme.desc: Live from Washington DC, Bev Turner and Ben Leo bring you the latest from the US and what it means for Britain.

programme.title: The Saturday Five Extra
programme.desc: Join our provocative panel to discuss and debate the spikiest stories and craziest controversies of the week.

programme.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight
programme.desc: Join Alex for two hours of lively debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the big issues of the day with Alex's fresh take on every story.

programme.title: Alex Armstrong Tonight Late Edition
programme.desc: Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Alex Armstrong.

programme.title: Breakfast with Stephen and Anne
programme.desc: It's Stephen and Anne here. Join us for the weekend breakfast show Britain is turning to. News from around our great country and the world is live here on GB News Breakfast.

programme.title: The Camilla Tominey Show
programme.desc: Join Camilla Tominey for a Sunday morning politics show with personality, live from Westminster.

programme.title: Sunday with Michael Portillo
programme.desc: Join Michael Portillo and guests for a relaxed look at the world of politics, culture and the arts.

programme.title: The Weekend
programme.desc: A lively look at all the latest live and breaking news for the weekend from around the UK with our network of GB News reporters, plus views and debate from a wide range of perspectives.

programme.title: Nana Akua

programme.desc: Emissary - Part 2: Sisko tries to secure the Bajorans' loyalty by searching for the eight orbs that were stolen by the Cardassians.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Into The Fire: Imprisoned on Hathor's planet, the SG-1's only hope is Hammond and Teal'c. (S3, ep 1)

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Spirit Folk: The holographic village of Fair Haven has been running constantly on the holodeck. The villagers become self-aware, resulting in problems. (S6, Ep 17)

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Inheritance: A routine mission brings Data face-to-face with a woman who claims to be his mother. (S7, ep 10)

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: Dodo Madness: Helen warns Nick of an anomaly at a football stadium. When the team arrive, a group of infected dodos come pouring through. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: Happy to Help: Bode's crew is accused of taking an expensive watch during a fire mop-up. The crew respond to a potentially dangerous situation about a gas leak. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Left of Boom: The Fly Team lands in hot water when Vo is found at the scene where a Hungarian gambling regulator was murdered. (S1, ep 16)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Skin Deep: Nick and Hank look for a Wesen link after they find a body that seems to have aged 70 years overnight. (S5, ep 15)

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: It's the Reading Festival, and the junior doctors have no idea what's in store for them - everything from a possible drug overdose to a mosh pit injury is possible.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: A Place For Paedophiles
programme.desc: Louis gains access to Coalinga State Hospital in California, which houses more than 500 convicted paedophiles - most of whom have been deemed unsafe for release.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Gambling in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Amiable everyman Louis Theroux explores the casino culture of Las Vegas. Meeting many of the local characters, Louis casts a wry eye over the gambling-obsessed city.

programme.desc: Assisting tonight's contestants are Harry Redknapp, Carol Vorderman, Nick Grimshaw, Andi Oliver, Tom Read Wilson, Angela Scanlon and Chunkz.

programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: The Great Escape: Normally, nobody in the Harpers would willingly set foot in Nick's flat, but when Susan's mother comes to stay, it suddenly seems more attractive.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Return of the Prodigal Prat: Sitcom. When the local paper announces Ben's death, he sees it as an opportunity to avoid doing all the things he doesn't want to do.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Owed to Susan: Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker lock horns as the Harpers' marriage is threatened. Susan discovers that the love poem Ben wrote to woo her was not an original.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Deliverance: Chaos ensues yet again as Janey's baby is due, and Susan insists on travelling to Manchester for the birth. The journey throws up several blasts from the past.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Blind Justice: Ben discovers that juries can be just as blind as justice, and Susan is rendered temporarily sightless by a domestic discovery at home.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Friday the 31st: Frenzied family life with the Harpers in the show that's a surefire ratings winner. Susan decides to enter enthusiastically into the spirit of 'trick or treat'.

programme.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
programme.desc: Kylo & Sasha: Kylo, a Rough Collie puppy from Glasgow, suffers from front leg deformities, while Golden Retriever Sasha also has a deformed foot where her toes haven't properly developed.

programme.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
programme.desc: Rolo, Astrid & Jeff: The practice has an unusual patient when ferret Astrid breaks her leg while doing a 'war dance', and puddle-loving Labrador Jeff has a developmental elbow disease.

programme.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
programme.desc: Dexter, Driver & Bailey: Noel treats handsome Dobermann Dexter, who has a serious spinal condition, and feisty feline Driver, who's been hit by a car, resulting in hip and knee injuries.

programme.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
programme.desc: Moon, Milo & Ollie: Eight-year-old Dalmatian Milo's squashed spinal cord causes him constant pain, and Noel attempts to fuse four-year-old Shih Tzu Ollie's elbow in order to save his leg.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In a dramatic start to the new series, the West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Hard-working ambulance crews help a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: A four-year-old girl has her droopy eyelid lifted, a rugby player gets his broken nose reset and a woman has an operation on her wrist after almost a year of agony.

programme.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
programme.desc: Nick has an ultrasound taken from inside his body to find out if he needs open-heart surgery, and Irene has gel removed from her eye to make her see again.

programme.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
programme.desc: Literal Babies Delivering Babies: Mollie makes being a midwife look easy as she helps a woman give birth, but Mary is still getting used to the ward and doubts herself after a tough shift.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley: Face to Face with Armageddon
programme.desc: The journalist meets Americans prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Anna and Darren treat a woman suffering from terminal cancer. Laura and Kerry are called to attend a young man with a painful abscess in his throat.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Philadelphia
